NPHIES-AI Mastery

Accelerate your health-tech integration in Saudi Arabia.

A specialized technical course focused on FHIR R4 interoperability, NPHIES compliance, and AI-driven automation for claims, authorizations, and patient eligibility.

Course Objectives

  • Understand the architecture of the NPHIES platform and FHIR R4 resources.
  • Implement automated workflows for pre-authorizations and claims processing.
  • Ensure full compliance with Saudi health data regulations and interoperability standards.
  • Train AI models to audit claims and prevent revenue leakage before submission.

Course Materials & Downloads

Download the required technical documentation for FHIR R4 and NPHIES interoperability below:

FHIR R4 & NPHIES Integration Guide (PDF) BrainSAIT Technical Architecture (PDF)
